zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Talbot於1418年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利時，她的父親Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury34歲，母親Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival26歲。她於1436年與Sir Nicholas de Eyton在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年在英國肯特多福享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Talbot于1418年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利时，她的父亲Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury34岁，母亲Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival26岁。她于1436年与Sir Nicholas de Eyton在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年在英国肯特多福享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Talbot was born in 1418, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury, was 34 and her mother, Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival, was 26. She married Sir Nicholas de Eyton in 1436, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1500, in Dover, Kent, England, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Talbot est née en 1418, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas d’Eyton en 1436, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1500, à Dover, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Talbot 1418 in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury 34 und ihre Mutter Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival 26. Sie hat 1436 in England Sir Nicholas de Eyton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1500 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Dover, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Talbot è nata il nel 1418 nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas de Eyton nel 1436, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1500, nel Dover, Kent, England, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Talbotが1418年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsburyは34歳，母Maude Neville, Baroness Furnivalは26歳であった。1436年にイギリスでSir Nicholas de Eytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年にイギリスケントドバーで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Talbot(이)가 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1436년 영국에서 Sir Nicholas de Eyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 켄트 도버에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Talbot nasceu em 1418, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Nicholas de Eyton em 1436, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1500, em Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Talbot родилась в 1418 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas de Eyton в 1436 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1500 г. в местности довир, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Talbot nació en 1418, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Talbot 1st Earl of Shrewsbury, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Maude Neville, Baroness Furnival, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Nicholas de Eyton en 1436, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1500, en Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años.
